messages.content: hi i had made a youtube shorts from kunal khemu podcast with raj shamani transcript"यू वाइफ मैट। जब उसकी फिल्म देखना दिल मांगे तो मेरा और मैं दो। हम दहिसर में रहते हैं। पिक्चर बिल्कुल अच्छी लगी। मैं मगर सोहा ali khan बहुत अच्छी लगती हूं। मैं छोटे। एक दिन मेरी गर्लफ्रेंड हूं और शादी होगी तो मेरे को उस ने याद दिलाई। दिन कहता, यार तू तो यार जो बोलता करता है क्या? अगर तूने यह बात बोल दी। मैं बोला, घर के बगल वाले थिएटर में तुम चल रही थी। वहां चले जाते तो एंजलीना जोली मेरी बीवी होती तो कुर्सी।" now make strong SEO title, description with proper tags and keywords for youtube shorts in hinglish

Creating a YouTube Shorts video from the podcast by Kunal Khemu and Raj Shamani can attract a good number of viewers, especially if you optimize the title, description, and tags for SEO. Below I suggest a title, description, and tags that mix Hindi and English (Hinglish) to cater to the bilingual audience.

**Title:**
Kunal Khemu Ki Funny Love Story | Soha Ali Khan Aur Unki Shadi Ki Mast Kissa | #YouTubeShorts #RajShamani

**Description:**
Dive into the hilarious and heartwarming tale of how Kunal Khemu fell for Soha Ali Khan before they tied the knot! Watch this YouTube Short extracted from the candid podcast conversation between Kunal Khemu and Raj Shamani. Laugh and learn as Kunal shares his filmy love story, dreams, and the adorable twist of fate that led him to his life partner. Don't forget to like, share, and subscribe for more entertaining snippets! #KunalKhemu #SohaAliKhan #BollywoodLoveStories 🎥✨

**Tags:**
- Kunal Khemu
- Soha Ali Khan
- Raj Shamani
- Bollywood Love Story
- Podcast Highlights
- Love Story Shorts
- Relationship Goals
- Hindi Short Video
- YouTubeShorts India
- Entertainment Clips
- Short Viral Video
- Hindi Podcast Clips

**Keywords for SEO Enhancement:**
- Kunal Khemu Soha Ali Khan love story
- Kunal Khemu and Soha Ali Khan
- Bollywood actors relationship
- Bollywood celebrity marriage
- Love story YouTube Shorts
- Raj Shamani podcast clips
- Bollywood couples shorts
- Hindi entertainment shorts

Remember, the character limits and text policies of YouTube should be kept in mind, where titles are typically best kept short but descriptive, and descriptions would benefit from more detail and relevant links or calls to action. Since the platform frequently updates its algorithms and policies, it's advisable to stay updated with YouTube's best practices for optimizing Shorts.

My apologies for the confusion. When listing tags on YouTube, you should separate them with commas. Here is the revised set of tags:

**Tags:**
- Kunal Khemu,
- Soha Ali Khan,
- Raj Shamani,
- Bollywood Love Story,
- Podcast Highlights,
- Love Story Shorts,
- Relationship Goals,
- Hindi Short Video,

- Short Viral Video,
- Hindi Podcast Clips

Please enter these tags in the tags section when you upload your video, each separated by a comma, to help with the SEO and discoverability of your YouTube Shorts content.

Certainly! Here's how you would present the tags for your YouTube Shorts video in paragraph form, with each tag separated by a comma:

Tags: "Kunal Khemu, Soha Ali Khan, Raj Shamani, Bollywood Love Story, Podcast Highlights, Love Story Shorts, Relationship Goals, Hindi Short Video, YouTubeShorts India, Entertainment Clips, Short Viral Video, Hindi Podcast Clips."

Ensure that each tag is relevant to the content of your video for the best SEO results on YouTube. Input these tags in the designated tag section when uploading your video to YouTube.

To keep your tags under 500 characters, you can use succinct tags that are most relevant to the content of your YouTube Shorts video. Here's a compact version:

Tags: "Kunal Khemu, Soha Ali Khan, Bollywood Stories, Raj Shamani Podcast, Funny Love Tale, Celeb Marriage, Bollywood Shorts, Viral Clips, Indian YouTube Shorts, Entertaining Shorts, Bollywood Gossip."

These tags are within the character limit and should cover the main aspects of your video content, thus helping with SEO and discoverability. Remember to adapt and prioritize your tags based on the core subject of your video for the best outcomes.

To include more relevant keywords within the 500 character limit for your YouTube Shorts tags, consider the following revised list:

Tags: "Kunal Khemu, Soha Ali Khan, Raj Shamani, Bollywood Love, Podcast Story, Relationship Talk, Celebrity Wedding, Film Gossip, Entertainment Shorts, Dil Maange More, Bollywood Couple, Funny Anecdote, Love Story Short, Indian Celebrity, YouTube India, Kunal Soha Story, Hindi Podcast."

This set of tags concisely includes various important keywords related to the content of the video while maximizing the use of the available characters.

Keep in mind that when creating SEO-friendly content on YouTube, you should always ensure that the title, description, and tags are not just keyword-rich but also accurately represent the video content. This will improve your video's visibility, and matching viewer expectations can increase watch time, which positively impacts video rankings.

Including multiple tags within your video description to enhance discoverability on YouTube is not the recommended practice for YouTube SEO. Tags should be placed in the designated tags section when uploading your video. However, you can naturally include relevant keywords within the narrative of your description to help improve SEO. Here’s how you can integrate essential keywords into a detailed description.

A balanced approach with a few strategically placed tags (typically no more than 15 hashtags) is recommended. The most relevant hashtags typically are placed at the end of the description, or seamlessly integrated into the text.
